island_01_quest_01a.title: Once upon a time...
island_01_quest_01a.summary_pre: What did that mushroom just say again?
island_01_quest_01a.summary_active: Use the 'Strengthen' spell to overpower your attack, and loot some opponents.

dialog.text: Mushy: Wow, you are a real hero!  Thank you for saving me from that awful crow!

dialog: I can also show you how to cast a "Strengthen" that you will be able to use to raise our attack and defense points, assuming you have Magic Points (MP) to cast with.
The spell will use your Magic Points (MP) and will wear off over time.  But for a while, we will be able to fight the monsters in this area and win.
Defeating monsters will grant us gold and experience.  If your life and magic points are getting low, we can visit the Inn in the nearby town, and sleep for the night.
Oh, and if you want to recharge the magic abilities in your items, you can do that in the Temple, or just sleep for the night and items will recharge on their own.

island_01_quest_01b.title: First Steps, First Stats
island_01_quest_01b.summary_pre: Mushy: See, that wasn't that hard!
island_01_quest_01b.summary_active: Player is taken to level up screen and must use their 10 status points.

dialog.text: Mushy: See, that wasn't that hard!

dialog: Now that you have leveled up, you should have 10 "status" points that you can use to increase your base stats.

You can power up your Life Points (HP), and if you picked the mystic path you can increase your Mana Points (MP).  You should also increase your attack points and defense points, so we won't be so reliant on the Strengthen spell.

island_01_quest_01c.title: Three's a Team
island_01_quest_01c.summary_pre: Mushy: Now you know the basic of fighting, let's talk a bit about Fusion.
island_01_quest_01c.summary_active: Player must fight opponents and convince 2 mini mushrooms to join team.  Once there are 3 mini mushrooms on team....

dialog.text: Mushy: Now you know the basic of fighting, let's talk a bit about Fusion.

dialog: I am just a small little mushroom, but if we can find 2 more mini mushrooms to join our team, then we will be able to fuse our powers to evolve into a stronger form.
Don't worry, fushion doesn't hurt.  It is just another way to power up and combine our talents.
If we fight a few more monsters, we are bound to come upon a few more mini mushrooms like me.  If I can convince 2 mushrooms to join us, then we will be able to fuse our powers together.

island_01_quest_01d.title: Mushroom Fusion
island_01_quest_01d.summary_pre: Mushy: Great!  Now that we have 3 mini mushrooms on our team, you can fuse us.
island_01_quest_01d.summary_active: Player must go to Town, Visit Temple, and Fuse 3 mini mushrooms.

dialog.text: Mushy: Great!  Now that we have 3 mini mushrooms on our team, you can fuse us.

dialog: Travel to the town and visit the Temple.  The priestest there will be able to fuse us and evolve us to our next level.

island_01_quest_02a.title: Chase the Moon
island_01_quest_02a.summary_pre: Mushy: Oh no!  It looks like there is a Golden Wolf pup with his foot caught in a trap.  Maybe if we can free him, we can convince him to join our cause.
island_01_quest_02a.summary_active: Recruit two more wolf pups to join the team.

dialog.text: Mushy: Oh no!  It looks like there is a Golden Wolf pup with his foot caught in a trap.  Maybe if we can free him, we can convince him to join our cause.

dialog: The pup is grateful.  He decides to join us.  We'll call him Chase.
Now we should find two more wolf pups so they can fight alongside us.

island_01_quest_02b.title: Pack Bond
island_01_quest_02b.summary_pre: Mushy: Great!  Now that we have 3 wolf pups on our team, we can fuse them.
island_01_quest_02b.summary_active: Player must go to Town, Visit Temple, and Fuse 3 wolf pups.

dialog.text: Mushy: Great!  Now that we have 3 wolf pups on our team, we can fuse them.

dialog: Travel to the town and visit the Temple.  The priestest there will be able to fuse the wolf pups and evolve them to their next level.

island_01_quest_03a.title: Beba Hexa
island_01_quest_03a.summary_pre: Narration: Chase's ears perk up and his tail starts wagging.  Chase runs towards the forest, looking back to signal for you to follow.
island_01_quest_03a.summary_active: Team must win a battle against 4 baby trolls with Beba on their team.
dialog: Narration: Chase's ears perk up and his tail starts wagging.  Chase runs towards the forest, looking back to signal for you to follow.

dialog.text: Mushy: It seems like Chase has picked up a scent.  We better follow him!
Beba: Take that you mean trolls!

dialog: Narration: You come upon a small fairy who appaers to be fighting 4 small trolls.

dialog.text: Mushy: Hey Beba!  What kind of trouble have you gotten into today?
Beba: A fairy princess like me is never in trouble, Mushy.  You know that.

dialog: But I suppose if you want to give me a hand in punishing these nasty trolls, I won't stop you.

island_01_quest_03b.title: Power of Three
island_01_quest_03b.summary_pre: Beba: Well, I guess having you all around is kind of helpful.  I suppose you can join my royal court and become my servants if you insist.
island_01_quest_03b.summary_active: Player has to battle opponents until finding 2 fairies to join the team.

dialog.text: Beba: Well, I guess having you all around is kind of helpful.  I suppose you can join my royal court and become my servants if you insist.

dialog: Narration: Beba joins the team.

dialog.text: Beba: It's only fair I share a bit of my magic knowledge with you.  Here, take this:

dialog: Narration: Beba teaches the player the "Healing" spell.

dialog.text: Beba: We fairies are particuarly good at healing, so when your life is getting low, you can use that spell to restore some hit points.

dialog: Besides healers, fairies are also known as powerful warriors.  What, I'm not kidding!
Tell you what, if we can find 2 more small faries to join our team, and we can evolve me to my next level, then I will introduce you to the 4 fairy warriors who live in these woods.

island_01_quest_03c.title: Warrior's Ring
island_01_quest_03c.summary_pre: Beba: Excellent!  Now let's head to the Temple and have the priestess fuse us faries.
island_01_quest_03c.summary_active: Player travels to temple and uses fuse on 3 faries.

dialog.text: Beba: Excellent!  Now let's head to the Temple and have the priestess fuse us faries.

island_01_quest_03d.title: Ogre's Hoard
island_01_quest_03d.summary_pre: Beba: Alright, well a promise is a promise.  Follow me to the woods, and I will introduce you to the great fairy warriors: Eenie, Meenie, Miney & Mo.
island_01_quest_03d.summary_active: Player must win the battle against the 4 fairy warriors.

dialog.text: Beba: Alright, well a promise is a promise.  Follow me to the woods, and I will introduce you to the great fairy warriors: Eenie, Meenie, Miney & Mo.

dialog: If we can best them in a battle, they will grant us the "Sprite Bite" spell, so we can call them to help us attack in battle.
Narration: Eenie, Meenie, Miney, Mo. Who here dares to be our foe!?

dialog.text: Beba: Oh, heya!  It's just me Beba, and my royal court.  Would you be so kind as to lend us your power?

dialog: Narration: Hi Beba.  You know the rules.  If you can best us in a friendly battle, we will grant you the Sprite Bite spell so you can call us in battle to help vanquish your enemies.

dialog.text: Beba: Ready or not, here we come!

island_01_quest_03e.title: Stone of Power
island_01_quest_03e.summary_pre: Narration: You have proven yourself, so as promised, here is the "Sprite Bite" spell.  And since it was just a friendly fight, we will restore your HP and MP as well.
island_01_quest_03e.summary_active: Next Opponent player fights in the Forest will be the Giant Ogre.  Player must defeat Giant Ogre in battle.
dialog: Narration: You have proven yourself, so as promised, here is the "Sprite Bite" spell.  And since it was just a friendly fight, we will restore your HP and MP as well.
Narration: Now that we have aggreed to help you, there is something you can do for us.
There is a Giant Ogre who lives in these woods.  He recently stoll our mana stone.  This powerful relic can raise MP and magic power all at the same time.
His cave is nearby.  With our combined power, we should be able to defeat the Giant Ogre and his minions, and recover the mana stone.

island_01_quest_03f.title: Instinct Unlocked
island_01_quest_03f.summary_pre: Beba: I have never seen a real Mana Stone before.  With this I should be more powerful than ever!
island_01_quest_03f.summary_active: Player Uses Mana Stone - spells receive 10 Rank XP each, advancing to rank 2.  Player receives 20 MP bonus as well.

dialog.text: Beba: I have never seen a real Mana Stone before.  With this I should be more powerful than ever!

dialog: Okay fine, you can use the mana stone if you really want to.  It will grant you Spell XP, which will go a long way towards ranking up your spells.
When spells increase in rank, they grow in power.  Attack spells of Rank 2 and 3 typically attack multiple enemies at once as well.

And as an added bonus, this will grant you an additional 20 Mana Points.  This will really expand your magic capabilities, and let you cast more spells in a single day, before having to rest at the Inn to recoup your Mana.

island_01_quest_04a.title: Pups of the Pack
island_01_quest_04a.summary_pre: Beba: When casting spells now, you can select Rank 1 or Rank 2.  Keep in mind Rank 2 uses more MP, but also increases the power of your spells.
island_01_quest_04a.summary_active: Player must battle until finding 2 more baby ogres to join the team.

dialog.text: Beba: When casting spells now, you can select Rank 1 or Rank 2.  Keep in mind Rank 2 uses more MP, but also increases the power of your spells.

dialog: And don't forget, we can always rest at the Inn to recover our HP and MP.  Nothing quite like a good nights rest, you know.

dialog.text: Ogrito: Hello.  My name is Ogrito Pequeno.  You killed my father.  Prepare to die...
Beba: Aww, what a cute little baby ogre.  Are you lost kid?
Ogrito: What?  No, didn't you hear me.  I am here to exact revenge against you fiends!
Chase: Ruff!  (Chase bats his Puppy Eyes at Ogrito)
Ogrito: No, that won't work on me.  I don't care how cute and cuddly you are!
Chase: Hmph... (Puppy Eyes just don't quit).
Ogrito: Ohh, you are just too cute.  I can't stay mad at you.

dialog: To be honest, my dad was kind of a jerk.  He was always stealing magic relics anyway.
Fine, I will hang out with you for a little while.  But just so you know, I will most likely kill you in the morning.

island_01_quest_04b.title: Pack Fusion
island_01_quest_04b.summary_pre: Ogrito: Oh I see.  Just because you leveled me up, you want me to share my Fit of Rage spell with you?  Inconceiveable!
island_01_quest_04b.summary_active: Player learns "Fit of Rage" spell from Ogrito.

dialog.text: Ogrito: Oh I see.  Just because you leveled me up, you want me to share my Fit of Rage spell with you?  Inconceiveable!

dialog: Ok, fine.  Just this one time though.

dialog.text: Ogrito: Ogre's have a powerful ability to rage up our attack points.  Yeah, so this will lower our defense points at the same time, but as long as we finish off our enemies quick like, it's not a problem.

island_01_quest_04c.title: Poison Pythons
island_01_quest_04c.summary_active: Player must defeat the Poisonous Python in battle.

dialog.text: Golden Wolf Messenger: Woof!
Chase: Woof woof....
Golden Wolf Messenger: Woof, growl, woof woof.
Chase: Woof.

dialog: Narration: Chase looks at you, as if he is waiting for a response.

dialog.text: Mushy: Oops, I forgot for a minute you don't speak Wolf.  Fine I can translate I guess.

dialog: Let's see, basically there is a population of Poisonous Pythons pilfering pups per the pack.  Pythons project powerful poison that packs a potent brunch...

dialog.text: Mushy: Woof!

dialog: Oh, sorry, I mean 'punch'...  Anyway, TL;DR -- puppies buen-o, snakes bad-o, got it?

island_01_quest_04d.title: Golden Trust

dialog.text: Chase: Woof!
Pups: Woof woof woof!
Pack Leader: Bark.  Woof, woof. Howl!

dialog: Narration: The Pack Leader give you the Golden Collar

dialog.text: Mushy: Wow, a Golden Collar from the Pack Leader himself.  As long as you wear this necklace on you, no Golden Wolf will dare to attack you in battle.

island_01_quest_02c.title: Troll Tussle
island_01_quest_02c.summary_pre: Mushy: Our team is really progressing nicely!
island_01_quest_02c.summary_active: Player casts "Animal Instinct" spell and goes to the Forrest.

dialog.text: Mushy: Our team is really progressing nicely!
Chase: Woof.
Mushy: What is it boy?  Timmy fell down a well?
Chase: Woof?
Mushy: No, I'm just kidding. Alright I will tell them...

dialog: So Chase says he can teach you a special magic ability "Animal Instincts."  With this spell you will be able to sense opponents in the forrest before they appear.
This will let us get the jump on opponents, giving us an pre-emptive attack before the battle actually starts.

dialog.text: Mushy: Great!  Now that you have the Animal Instinct spell, let's go the forrest and see what kind of enemies we can sniff out.

island_01_quest_00.title: A Crow and a Mushroom
island_01_quest_00.summary_pre: A crow has a mushroom pinned against a tree.
island_01_quest_00.summary_active: Choose a weapon and drive off the crow.

dialog.text: One day as you are walking through the woods, you come upon an unusual scene.  A small mushroom is pinned against a tree as a crow swoops down from overhead.
Mushy: Hey!  Over here!  Please help me!
Mushy: Here, use one of these! - The mushroom stretches out its hand to you, and you see a mage's staff and a warrior's club.
Mushy: I sure you hope you know how to use that thing...
As you take the staff in your hand, you see lights flashing in your mind.  The words "Magic Spark" echo in your ears.
Mushy: This staff has the Magic Spark spell embued into it.  You can use this to fend off that nasty crow.

island_01_quest_000a.title: Tea of Enlightenment
island_01_quest_000a.summary_pre: Mushy: Drink this tea to awaken your magic.

dialog.text: Mushy: That staff is very powerful, but it does have limited charges.  Here, drink this Tea of Enlightenment and it will awake your magic potential.
You drink the Tea of Enlightenment.  Your MP increases and your defense surges.
Mushy: Now if the staff runs out of charges, you can use your Magic Points (MP) to cast the spell as well.  And after each battle, the staff will recharge 5 spell charges.

island_01_quest_000b.title: Mystic Cape
island_01_quest_000b.summary_pre: Mushy: This cape will keep you safe.

dialog.text: Mushy: I stitched a mystic cape for you.  It will protect you and help your mana.

Mushy: This cape carries two imbued spells: Healing recovers your Health Points, and Harden will toughen your skin, increasing DEF.  After each battle, the cape will recharge 1 spell charge for each imbued spell.

island_01_quest_000c.title: Crow Ambush
island_01_quest_000c.summary_pre: The baby crow returns with allies.
island_01_quest_000c.summary_active: Defeat the baby crows threatening Mushy.

dialog.text: Mushy: You seem to be a natural at this.  With me on your team, we can take on a whole bunch of crows!
Crow Crew: Hey, you are just some kid!  How dare you come scare me off and interupt my mushroom dinner.
Mushy: Ready or not, here they come!  I sure hope you can figure out how to use those magical items I gave you.

on_complete_actions.message: Mushy: You did it!  We scared them off for good.

island_01_quest_001a.title: Warrior Awakening
island_01_quest_001a.summary_pre: Your warrior path is just beginning.

dialog.text: Mushy: The club feels right in your hands.  We will hone your strength next.
This warrior path quest is not ready yet.
Mushy: We will put your strength to the test soon.

island_01_quest_001c.title: Warrior Ambush
island_01_quest_001c.summary_pre: A final warrior test lies ahead.

dialog.text: Mushy: The final warrior trial will be ready soon.
